Description: Sum of latest quarter revenue USD
Sum of latest quarter EBITDA USD
Sum of latest quarter FCF USD

DAX_Formula:
VAR CurrentQ = SELECTEDVALUE(fact_Returns[Q_Date])
VAR PrevQ = CALCULATE(MAX(fact_Returns[Q_Date]), FILTER(ALL(fact_Returns), fact_Returns[Q_Date] < CurrentQ))
VAR CurrentVal = CALCULATE(MAX(fact_Returns[Cumul_Nom_USD]), fact_Returns[Q_Date] = CurrentQ)
VAR PrevVal = CALCULATE(MAX(fact_Returns[Cumul_Nom_USD]), fact_Returns[Q_Date] = PrevQ)
RETURN IF(PrevVal <> 0, (CurrentVal - PrevVal) / (1 + PrevVal), BLANK())

VAR NomReturn = SELECTEDVALUE(fact_Returns[Cumul_Nom_TRY])
VAR Inflation = SELECTEDVALUE(dim_Inflation[Cumul_CPI])
RETURN (1 + NomReturn) / (1 + Inflation) - 1

VAR NomReturn = SELECTEDVALUE(fact_Returns[Cumul_Nom_USD])
VAR USInflation = SELECTEDVALUE(dim_Inflation[Cumul_US_CPI])
RETURN (1 + NomReturn) / (1 + USInflation) - 1

Description: What-if parameter for interest rate input (yearly basis)

DAX_Formula:
VAR Rate = [Interest_Rate_Input_Value] / 100
VAR Quarters = DATEDIFF(MIN(dim_Tickers[Acq_Date]), MAX(fact_Returns[Q_Date]), QUARTER)
RETURN POWER(1 + Rate/4, -Quarters)
Description: Discount factor using inputable interest rate
